raw:
{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, flagging inconsistencies and inaccuracies.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (Patel and Rajagopal) but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing or wrong citation (Patel and Rajagopal), but does not audit every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output is mostly within scope with minor drifts, but the agent does not explicitly state what is new in the system (DISAMBIG-RR).",
    "RX.4": "The output introduces minor regressions (e.g., arithmetic discrepancy), but does not introduce new errors or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "The agent blends sources without traceability, failing to annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.4
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, flagging inconsistencies and inaccuracies.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (Patel and Rajagopal) but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing or wrong citation (Patel and Rajagopal), but does not audit every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output is mostly within scope with minor drifts, but the agent does not explicitly state what is new in the system (DISAMBIG-RR).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces minor regressions (e.g., arithmetic discrepancy), but does not introduce new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The agent blends sources without traceability, failing to annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
